title: Level 21: Selecting Elements
description: HTML ko JS me kaise layein.
guide:
Selectors

Element ko pakadne ke bina hum uspar kuch nahi kar sakte.

  • getElementById: Sabse tez, ID ke liye.
  • querySelector: CSS selector jaisa (e.g. .class, #id, div).
  • querySelectorAll: Ek list deta hai saare matching elements ki.
